description_long: This armchair features a classic, ornate wooden frame with intricate carvings along the top and front apron, giving it a vintage or French provincial appearance. The upholstery is a light, almost white fabric with a subtle, irregular pattern that adds a touch of texture and visual interest. The seat is wide and plush, complemented by a matching rectangular cushion for added comfort. The armrests are partially upholstered and supported by carved wooden posts, blending both comfort and decorative detail. The legs are cabriole-style, ending in claw-and-ball feet, which further enhance the traditional aesthetic. The backrest is high and gently curved, providing ample support and a sense of enclosure.
description: A vintage-style armchair with ornate carved wood, light patterned upholstery, and a high, curved backrest. Features plush seating, a matching cushion, and cabriole legs with claw-and-ball feet.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high, curved backrest, plush seat, matching cushion, and ornate wood carvings.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the seat, the curvature of the backrest, and the partially upholstered armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous upholstery on the back and the carved wood frame outlining the shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest structure and the elegant leg design.
attribute_armrest_design: partially upholstered, carved wooden supports, gently curved
attribute_backrest_style: high, rounded, fully upholstered with carved wood trim
attribute_leg_type: carved wooden cabriole legs with claw-and-ball feet
attribute_upholstery_pattern: subtle irregular pattern on light fabric
